last_verdict: Multi-GPU aggregation fixed, stale entry points ported, pipeline connectivity verified, setup supports conda-only servers
pending_experiments: Run end-to-end smoke test on GPU server
note: Round 6 fixes: (1) multi-GPU summary writes now use file-locked merge with cross-init stats recomputation from all shards; (2) dead _inject_boundary_state removed; (3) stale entry points (invert_parameters.py, run_progressive_inversion.py, run_defense_eval.py) ported to match current SPSIConfig API via compat layer; (4) Phase F recovery eval now checks model existence before running; (5) resolved config and run metadata written to results/ for reproducibility; (6) setup.sh supports conda-only servers; (7) --aggregate_only flag for explicit post-parallel aggregation; (8) YAML inversion hyperparameters loaded into run_spsi.py; (9) KD resume_from_checkpoint honors explicit path.
